creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
Created attachment 172493
tmux 2.2 patch

- Full change log is here: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmux/tmux/master/CHANGES

- This patch change MASTER_SITES to GH

- Removed `files/patch-server-client.c`: this patch merged into upstream already.
  (https://github.com/tmux/tmux/commit/5ed17e84faed0a7655ec1eb3de291b60839dcb12)

- Example files change: the `examples` dir gone.
    Now we only have `${WRKSRC}/example_tmux.conf`
  (https://github.com/tmux/tmux/commit/2a1bb91bf73366b89d27f2ecfacdc770ceecb72e)

- Bash completion file moved to single repo, so I removed it in this port.
  (I'm also curious about: if we want to keep the bash completion file, how to make this in ports system?)

  (https://github.com/imomaliev/tmux-bash-completion)
  (https://github.com/tmux/tmux/commit/a33bb3e876895ef40ee90e5f89c76184e65c7f10)
